real_interview.content: IntroV4Confirmation (hi i'm ellie thanks for coming in today i was created to talk to people in a safe and secure environment i'm not a therapist but i'm here to learn about people and would love to learn about you i'll ask a few questions to get us started and please feel free to tell me anything your answers are totally confidential are you ok with this)
how_doingV (so how are you doing today)
when_LA (when did you move to l_a)
often_backB (how often do you go back to your hometown)
uh once a year for christmas break
compares_LA (how does it compare to l_a)
why_LA (why did you move to l_a)
i wanted to perform <perf> to pursue a film degree or i'm sorry a film career
it's pretty challenging but it's uh fun
change_directions (what made you decide to do that)
uh i've always had a interest <inter> interest in uh film and movies so uh it seemed like a natural pick for me
adapted_LA (how easy was it for you to get used to living in l_a)
uh took about a couple of years
i feel like i'm pretty used to it now
like_about_LA (what are some things you really like about l_a)
uh i like that uh it doesn't snow it's warm weather
and there's lots do to with a lot of beaches
dont_like_LA (what are some things you don't really like about l_a)
and the cost of living is pretty high
travel_shoes (i'm sure you can tell by my shoes i'm not much of a world explorer do you travel a lot)
i've never been outside of the u_s but uh i would love to at some point
shyoutgoing (do you consider yourself more shy or outgoing)
uh it depends on the situation i i can either be introverted or extroverted just given uh the right circumstance
relax_fishtank (sometimes when i'm feeling tense i turn on the fish tank screensaver hey i know it's not hawaii but it's the best i've got what do you do to relax)
i like uh listening to music uh doing crossword puzzles
reading and hanging out with friends on weekends
control_temper (how are you at controlling your temper)
last_argument (when was the last time you argued with someone and what was it about)
i don't think it was argument maybe <may> maybe a difference of opinion so it was more like a debate
but uh it was pretty pretty tame
tell_about_that (can you tell me about that)
uh i think it was a
over a basketball <ba> a basketball game
i was talking on facebook with somebody about it
but i think it's good to
uh express yourself if you have a difference of opinion it's uh
i think talking <ta> talking about is healthy <hea> is healthy
family_relationship (tell me about your relationship with your family)
i have a very good relationship with my family um i get along with all of my family members and extended you know cousins and aunts and uncles
there's no one that i i've ever had any rifts with
situation_handled (tell me about a situation that you wish you had handled differently)
i probably could've been more disciplined growing up
more disciplined with schoolwork and homework that kinda thing
but for the most part uh i had a i had a good childhood and uh there's not much i would change about it
hard_decisionB (tell me about the hardest decision you've ever had to make)
probably leaving my comfort zone in uh south carolina moving out here that was pretty
hard but at the same time it was
so it was it was a bittersweet feeling
a lot of excitement mixed with uh some anxiety but it uh
happy_didthat (are you happy you did that)
feelguilty (what's something you feel guilty about)
not doing better in school uh when i was in high school
avoid (could you have done anything to avoid it)
uh definitely i could've been a a <ss> um more diligent worker and i could've uh applied myself a little bit better
influence_positive (who's someone that's been a positive influence in your life)
i've always had a strong support <s> uh family support system
and uh parents and uh siblings
memory_erase (tell me about an event or something that you wish you could erase from your memory)
probably going back to school i wish i would've uh
wish i would've done better in school so if i could take something back from my past it would be
easy_sleep (how easy is it for you to get a good night's sleep)
sleep_affects (what are you like when you don't sleep well)
when i don't sleep well um
just tired throughout the day kinda groggy
behavior_changes (have you noticed any changes in your behavior or thoughts lately)
uh no everything's pretty much uh the way it usually is with me
feel_lately (how have you been feeling lately)
ptsd_diagnosed (have you ever been diagnosed with p_t_s_d)
depression_diagnosed (have you been diagnosed with depression)
happy_lasttime (tell me about the last time you felt really happy)
last time i felt really happy um
i made a lot of money uh a few weeks ago and uh i feel like i'm ahead of the game with you know with having rent under control and a lot of bills out here so
i'm still kinda have the lingering effects from that happiness
elaborate (could you say a little more about that)
when i have money i tend to be a lot uh
not even-tempered but i tend to feel better about things
and this city being such about your finances it it always makes you feel good to be ahead of the game
Ellie17Dec2012_07 (what would you say are some of your best qualities)
and i think i'm a good listener
advice_back (what advice would you give to yourself ten or twenty years ago)
to be as disciplined and focused as possible
because once you're out of your
parents' homes and out of their lives you have to
depend on yourself and the better the better you do in school and the better you are um
uh as far as discipline's concerned the more pleasurable <pleasur> pleasurable your life will be and
your life will be a lot easier
self_change (what are some things you wish you could change about yourself)
but i'm working on that and i've gotten a lot better
it's become pretty easy i think i'm just getting older um i'm out of my twenties now so
i definitely seen a change from when i first came out here
feelbadly (tell me about a time when someone made you feel really badly about yourself)
some people tend to say that my decision to move out here was uh not feasible and kind of a pipe dream so that kinda made me feel bad but
uh i kinda take insults in stride and um sometimes i welcome
'cause some some things are wrong with you that you're not aware of so as long as it's not mean-spirited and it's coming from the right place
i think it could be an invaluable uh tool you know listening to what to what other people
have to say that might be negative
BF_describe (how would your best friend describe you)
ideal_weekendC (tell me how you spend your ideal weekend)
i would love to go to vegas and have a road trip with with three or four friends
you know packed in the car and just uh lots of disposable income
and um you know good weather
bouts_symptoms (when was the last time that happened)
uh i haven't been to vegas in probably five years but
i've gone to casinos with my brother and that's pretty fun sometimes
Ellie17Dec2012_08 (what are you most proud of in your life)
i'm proud that i've come a long way from when i first moved out here i'm uh a lot more disciplined
i think i know what's important in life now and i'm more focused and going after what i want
mad_makeyou (what are some things that make you really mad)
i'm not a big fan of high taxes
but it doesn't really make me mad it makes me frustrated and and uh
i guess i take it in stride though
Ellie17Dec2012_10 (tell me about something you did recently that you really enjoyed)
i had a friend over at my apartment and i watched a movie and that was fun
asked_everything (okay i think i have asked everything i need to)
appreciate_open (thanks for sharing your thoughts with me)
